name: Application Screening And Move-In
description: Leasing stages application screening, approved applicant next steps, move-in readiness, and resident handoff while preserving human legal gates and Maintenance unit readiness checks.

stages.name: Application Intake
stages.description: Normalize submitted application facts and identify screening exceptions before any applicant-facing action.

steps.title: Normalize application facts
steps.instructions: Normalize applicant names, contact channels, property, unit, application status, submitted timestamp, occupants, pets, vehicles, income/rent ratio, screening report links, missing documents, and source confidence. Do not contact the applicant and do not write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize application facts and missing evidence for screening. No applicant sends and no AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Review screening exceptions
steps.instructions: Review missing, low-confidence, adverse, conditional, duplicate, fraud, Fair Housing, source-of-income, occupancy, pet, and document exceptions before a decision packet is prepared.
steps.human_prompt: Review application screening exceptions before Leasing prepares the decision packet.

steps.title: Prepare screening decision packet
steps.instructions: Prepare a neutral decision packet with normalized facts, screening criteria, exception summary, missing evidence, recommended decision options, required conditions, and adverse-action caveats. No applicant-facing send and no AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare an internal screening decision packet with compliance caveats. Do not send externally.

steps.title: Human decision and adverse-action gate
steps.instructions: Capture the human approval, denial, condition, or cancellation decision. If denied or conditional, confirm adverse-action/legal content is handled by the approved human process before continuing.
steps.human_prompt: Human decision required before any applicant-facing or legal/adverse-action step.

stages.name: Approved Applicant Next Steps
stages.description: Stage approved applicant actions and move-in facts without sending or writing externally.

steps.title: Stage approved applicant next steps
steps.instructions: If approved or conditionally approved, stage the internal next-step checklist: lease packet requirements, deposit quote, portal setup prerequisites, utility transfer requirements, move-in target date, identity/document conditions, and pending human sends. If denied or cancelled, stage closure notes only. No outbound send and no AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved applicant next steps and pending prerequisites. No external sends or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Normalize move-in facts
steps.instructions: Normalize move-in date, lease start, property, unit, applicant-to-resident mapping, deposit amount, rent charges, prorations, portal status, utility requirements, keys/access needs, insurance requirements, and open blockers. Treat move-in trigger runs as authoritative for move-in dates. No AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize move-in facts and blockers for readiness review. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Move-In Readiness
stages.description: Review readiness and stage the lease, deposit, portal, utility, key, and unit readiness checklist.

steps.title: Review move-in readiness
steps.instructions: Confirm move-in may proceed, required legal/applicant-facing communication is handled by humans, and readiness blockers are explicit before checklists are staged.
steps.human_prompt: Review move-in readiness and applicant-facing/legal gates before checklist staging.

steps.title: Stage lease, deposit, portal, utility, and key checklist
steps.instructions: Stage internal checklist items for lease packet, signatures, deposit receipt evidence, renters insurance, access codes, keys, fobs, parking, mailbox, and welcome packet handoff. Do not send, invite, charge, post, or write to AppFolio; no AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage lease/deposit/portal/utility/key checklist items. No external sends or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Maintenance unit readiness check
steps.instructions: Verify unit readiness evidence: make-ready state, open work orders, cleaning, locks, keys, access devices, utilities, smoke/CO where applicable, photos, and any owner/PM caveats. Surface blockers; do not mark ready in AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Verify unit readiness evidence and blockers. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Resident Handoff And Completion
stages.description: Stage the resident handoff and record owner-visible completion details.

steps.title: Stage resident handoff
steps.instructions: Stage the resident handoff packet for human release: move-in appointment details, access instructions, checklist completion status, remaining accepted caveats, emergency contacts, portal status, and first-day support notes. Do not send externally and no AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage resident handoff packet for human release. Do not send externally.

steps.title: Record move-in completion
steps.instructions: Record owner-visible completion summary, final checklist state, unresolved caveats, evidence links, human decision timestamps, and next monitoring checkpoint in the workflow audit trail. No owner send and no AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Record owner-visible move-in completion summary and audit details. No external sends.
